text:
is the fifth story arc of the Attack on Titan anime.

Introduction

The Scout Regiment has set out from Calaneth District, heading for Shiganshina while evading what Titans they encounter. However, havoc falls upon Erwin Smith's formation when a female-looking Titan attacks the right flank, seemingly hell-bent on finding Eren Jaeger and taking him alive.
